Framework Description: Common Cloud Controls Catalog (CCC) for GCP

Requirement Description: When any attempt is made to modify data on the service or a child resource, the service MUST log the client identity, time, and result of the attempt.
Section: CCC.Core.CN04 Log All Access and Changes
Framework Description: Common Cloud Controls Catalog (CCC) for GCP

Requirement Description: When any attempt is made to read data on the service or a child resource, the service MUST log the client identity, time, and result of the attempt.

Requirement Description: When enumeration activities are detected, the service MUST publish an event to a monitored channel which includes the client identity, time, and nature of the activity.
Section: CCC.Core.CN07 Alert on Unusual Enumeration Activity
Framework Description: Common Cloud Controls Catalog (CCC) for GCP
